LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR ANA PASCASIO'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS ORDERED TO PAY $50 PER PAY PERIOD TOWARDS THE JUDGMENT. $100 OF THE FUNDS NOW BEING HELD BY THE SHERIFF SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. THE REMAINING $789.31 SHALL BE RELEASED TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. COURT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar May-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ana Pascasio, Tel. 415.595.1251, defendant/claimant appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR ANA PASCASIO'S Claim Of Exemption is granted in part. Judgment debtor is ordered to pay $50 per pay period towards the judgment. $100 of the funds now being held by the Sheriff shall be released to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. The remaining $789.31 shall be released to the judgment debtor. Court shall prepare the order. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
